azure_trusted_signing_assessment.portal_notice: Artifact Signing is currently available to organizations in the USA, Canada, European Union & United Kingdom.

minimum_selection_criteria: supports South Korea legal organization validation
provides certificate fingerprint or verification output without exposing private key material
supports private key custody compatible with Windows signing host or CI signing workflow
can provide signed artifact verification evidence for Get-AuthenticodeSignature or equivalent

required_next_steps.provider_selection: select a Windows Authenticode provider that supports South Korea organization validation
required_next_steps.legal_identity_packet: prepare authorized legal organization name, website, business identifier, address, requester, and validation emails
required_next_steps.certificate_procurement: procure OV or EV code signing certificate without committing secrets
required_next_steps.signing_host: provide a Windows host or CI signing runner with approved key custody
required_next_steps.verification: record sanitized signing command, certificate fingerprint, Authenticode verification output, and Windows native install smoke
